name: Squirel Steps
description: Squirrel Steps is a fun puzzle game where you calculate the path to control the squirrel to collect all the pine nuts. Plan each step, avoid traps, and utilize the terrain to ensure you dont miss any targets. The gameplay is simple but strategic, helping to develop logical thinking and observation skills. Conquer all levels and achieve high scores in Squirrel Steps!
instructions: use W A S D to move
